title: geanthemum rhizanthum
intro: Geanthemum rhizanthum, also known as Mexican Gold or False Daisy, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it a potential remedy for wound healing, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Geanthemum rhizanthum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestive health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
